home.title: Stampeo - Loyalty cards your customers actually keep
home.description: Digital loyalty cards for Apple Wallet and Google Wallet. No app to download, no card to lose. Create your free loyalty card in minutes.
home.keywords: loyalty cards, digital loyalty, Apple Wallet, Google Wallet, customer rewards, stamp cards

onboarding.title: Get Started
onboarding.description: Set up your digital loyalty card in minutes

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Get in touch with the Stampeo team. Questions about our digital loyalty cards? We're here to help.

design-de-carte.title: Design Your Loyalty Card: Your Logo, Your Own Stamp Icons
design-de-carte.description: Colours, logo, and your own stamp icons with the background removed for you. Build a wallet-ready loyalty card in minutes, or send your logo and we design it in 24-48h.

scanner-mobile.title: Mobile Scanner — Stamp Customers in 0.8 Seconds, Even Offline
scanner-mobile.description: Dedicated app with haptic confirmation (0.8s) or in-browser web scanner. Offline mode for markets, basements and festivals — auto-syncs when back online.

notifications-push.title: Wallet Push Notifications — Every Stamp, Every Lock Screen
notifications-push.description: Stamp added, reward unlocked, milestone reached: every event sends an automatic notification to your customer's wallet. No extra app, no SMS cost.

analytiques.title: Loyalty Analytics — See Who's Coming Back and Who's Drifting
analytiques.description: Real-time dashboard: daily scans, active customers, rewards claimed. Growth tier adds trends, peak hours, 30-day retention and at-risk customer alerts.

geolocalisation.title: Loyalty Geofencing — On Their Lock Screen When They Walk Past
geolocalisation.description: When a customer walks near your shop, their loyalty card appears on their lock screen. No app, no Bluetooth. Zero location data collected on your end.

campagnes-promotionnelles.title: Wallet Promotional Campaigns — SMS Alternative for Small Business
campagnes-promotionnelles.description: Send promotional push notifications to your customers' Apple Wallet and Google Wallet. No SMS costs, ~85% open rate, segmentation and scheduling included. 3 free/month on Growth, unlimited on Pro.

programme-fondateur.title: Launch offer
programme-fondateur.description: 1 month free, then €20/month for life. All Growth features, available today.

acquisition.notFoundDesc: This business could not be found.
acquisition.title: Get your {businessName} loyalty card | Stampeo
acquisition.defaultDesc: Join {businessName}'s loyalty program and earn rewards with every visit.
